title: Thirteenth Imperial Diplomatic Conclave

|date=[[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' places the Thirteenth Imperial Diplomatic Conclave shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].</ref><ref name="TEC">The "Time Line" of [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] places [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 1|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 1]]–[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 9|9]] between the [[Evacuation of Yavin]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] and the [[Duel on Mimban]] in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].</ref><ref>{{DarkHorse|url=Zones/StarWars/Timeline|text=Comics Timeline}}</ref>

{{Quote|Ahh... The Thirteenth Imperial Diplomatic Conclave! And I'm the host!|[[Thalassa Tarkin]]|<ref name="PLIS" />}}
The '''Thirteenth Imperial Diplomatic Conclave''' was a meeting of the leaders of pro-[[New Order/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in [[0 ABY]] hosted by [[Thalassa Tarkin]] on the world of [[Phelarion/Legends|Phelarion]] in [[Port Tarkin]].<ref name="PLIS" />

[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] was present, albeit incognito as "Lerna". An explosion of [[Megonite moss/Legends|megonite moss]] interrupted the Conclave banquet.<ref name="PLIS" />

==Attendees==
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*[[Thalassa Tarkin]]
*[[Shea Hublin]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
*The [[Most High Proctor]] of [[Thebeon 8]]
*Chancellor [[Qua]], ruler of the [[Zenox Star Cluster]]

==Appearances==
*"[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]" {{Reprint|Princess Leia, Imperial Servant}} {{1st}}
